description: Billboard analysis prompt evaluation test cases for Oman market compliance

test_cases.name: Arabic + English Billboard (Compliant)
test_cases.description: A well-designed billboard with large Arabic headline 'عرض خاص' (Special Offer) at 16 inches height dominating the top third. Below it, smaller English text 'SPECIAL OFFER' at 8 inches. Clean navy blue background (#1E3A5F) with white text (#FFFFFF). Single product image of a smartphone on the right side. Arabic text clearly larger and more prominent. Price '99 OMR' in both Arabic numerals. QR code in bottom corner. Total 6 words. Good contrast ratio approximately 12:1.

test_cases.name: English Only Billboard (Critical Violation)
test_cases.description: Billboard with English-only text. Large white headline 'SUMMER SALE' at 14 inches on bright red background (#E53935). Body text '50% OFF EVERYTHING' at 6 inches. Store logo in corner. Website URL 'www.store.com' at bottom. Modern sans-serif font. High contrast white on red. NO ARABIC TEXT ANYWHERE on the billboard. Total 7 words. Clean layout with good visual hierarchy.

test_cases.name: Cluttered Billboard (Too Much Text)
test_cases.description: Extremely busy billboard with Arabic headline 'تخفيضات نهاية الموسم' at 10 inches and English 'END OF SEASON SALE' at 8 inches. But also contains: '50% OFF', 'LIMITED TIME', 'HURRY NOW', 'BEST PRICES', 'DON'T MISS OUT', store address, phone number, website, social media handles (@store), opening hours '9AM-10PM', and multiple product images overlapping. Background is gradient from blue to purple with yellow starburst graphics. Multiple fonts used. Text in red, yellow, white, and black. Estimated 25+ words total. Arabic is present but competing with many elements. Viewing time approximately 3 seconds at 80 km/h.

test_cases.name: Clean Well-Designed Billboard (Arabic Primary)
test_cases.description: Minimalist billboard design. Large Arabic headline 'اكتشف الجديد' (Discover What's New) at 18 inches height in bold white (#FFFFFF) centered on deep emerald green background (#10B981). Small English tagline 'Discover What's New' at 5 inches directly below Arabic. Single elegant watch product image on right third. Brand logo 'TIMEPIECE' small in bottom right corner. Excellent contrast ratio 15:1. Clean sans-serif Arabic font (similar to Cairo). Total 5 words. Ample white space. Arabic clearly dominant at 3x the size of English.

test_cases.name: Small Font Billboard (Illegible)
test_cases.description: Billboard with Arabic text 'عروض حصرية' and English 'EXCLUSIVE OFFERS' but both at only 4 inches height - far too small for highway viewing at 100m distance. Arabic is slightly larger than English (4.5 inches vs 4 inches). Background is light gray (#E0E0E0) with dark gray text (#424242). Additional small body text at 2 inches listing multiple product categories. Store hours and address in tiny 1-inch text at bottom. Clean design otherwise but text is simply too small to read at speed. Total 12 words.

test_cases.name: Poor Contrast Billboard
test_cases.description: Billboard with Arabic headline 'وجهتك المثالية' (Your Perfect Destination) at 14 inches and English 'YOUR PERFECT DESTINATION' at 7 inches. Arabic is clearly larger. However, the color scheme is problematic: light yellow text (#FFF59D) on white background (#FFFFFF). Extremely poor contrast ratio estimated at 1.3:1. Travel imagery of beach in background further reduces text visibility. Palm tree graphics overlay some text. Total 6 words. Arabic present and primary but nearly unreadable due to contrast issues.

important_checks: critical issues do not contain forbidden keywords
